event: Nationwide blackout affecting 6.68 million households
notes: Accidental gas supply interruption at Tatan Power Plant; CPC worker error cut natural gas to plant causing 4GW loss

event: FORMOSAT-7/COSMIC-2 launched on SpaceX Falcon Heavy
notes: Six satellite constellation for weather observation; joint Taiwan-US program; improved tropical weather forecasting

event: Taiwan drought begins affecting semiconductor production
notes: Worst drought in 56 years; TSMC and other fabs faced water rationing; emergency measures deployed

event: Drought intensifies across central and southern Taiwan
notes: Reservoirs dropped below 20% capacity; Hsinchu Science Park implemented water recycling at 85%+ rate

event: Major power outage affecting 4 million households
notes: Xingda Power Plant and Lushan Hydro units tripped; rolling blackouts in central and southern Taiwan

event: Second major power outage in same week
notes: Separate incident from May 13; underscored fragility of Taiwan power grid; 2 million households affected

event: Taiwan water rationing affects Hsinchu Science Park
notes: TSMC trucked in water and drilled wells to maintain fab operations; highlighted strategic vulnerability

event: Formosa 1 offshore wind farm fully operational (128MW)
notes: Taiwan's first commercial-scale offshore wind farm; joint venture Orsted JERA Swancor; 22 turbines

event: Yunlin offshore wind farm construction begins (640MW)
notes: Major offshore wind project; 80 turbines planned off Yunlin County coast

event: Matsu Islands undersea cables cut by Chinese sand dredger
notes: Two cables connecting Matsu to Taiwan severed; 14000 residents left with limited connectivity

event: Major power outage affecting 5.49 million households
notes: Human error at Xingda Power Plant caused south Taiwan blackout; TSMC fabs briefly disrupted

event: Matsu Islands second cable damage incident
notes: Additional cable damaged while repairs ongoing; Matsu relied on microwave backup for months

event: Greater Changhua offshore wind farms begin installation
notes: Orsted-led 900MW project; one of largest offshore wind developments in Asia-Pacific

event: Taipei LNG receiving terminal expansion project approved
notes: Third LNG terminal (Guantang) approved after controversial referendum; critical for energy transition

event: Matsu submarine cables finally repaired after 11-month outage
notes: Repairs delayed by weather and vessel availability; exposed vulnerability of island communications

event: Formosa 2 offshore wind farm fully operational (376MW)
notes: 47 Siemens Gamesa 8MW turbines off Miaoli coast; JERA and Macquarie investment

event: Greater Changhua 1 offshore wind farm operational (605MW)
notes: Largest single offshore wind farm in Taiwan; significant milestone for energy transition targets

event: FORMOSAT-8 remote sensing satellite program progresses
notes: Earth observation satellite constellation for disaster monitoring; indigenous development by TASA

event: Taoyuan Algal Reef LNG Terminal (Third LNG Terminal) construction advances
notes: Controversial Guantang terminal; reconfigured to reduce environmental impact after 2021 referendum

event: Taiwan targets 5.6 GW offshore wind capacity by 2025
notes: Part of energy transition plan; cumulative installed expected to reach 2+ GW by end 2024

event: Submarine cable protection zone legislation proposed
notes: Response to Matsu cable incidents; expanded protected zones and increased penalties for damage

event: Changhua-Yunlin subsea cable route survey completed
notes: New resilient cable routing to reduce single-point-of-failure risks for western coast communications

event: Zhongneng offshore wind farm construction begins (300MW)
notes: Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners project off Changhua; scheduled completion 2025

event: Xinda Power Plant new gas units commissioned
notes: Additional gas-fired capacity to replace retiring coal units; part of coal phase-down plan

event: Typhoon Gaemi causes widespread infrastructure damage
notes: Significant damage to power infrastructure; flooding in southern Taiwan; temporary fab disruptions

event: Taiwan AI data center power demand surge strains grid
notes: Rapid AI infrastructure build-out creating new electricity demand challenges; 2-3 GW additional demand projected

event: Yongan LNG terminal expansion operational
notes: Increased LNG receiving capacity to improve storage days from approximately 11 to 14 days

event: Submarine cable near Keelung damaged by Chinese-flagged vessel
notes: Trans-Pacific Express cable and another cable damaged off northern Taiwan; Chinese cargo ship suspected

event: TASA launches FORMOSAT-8 first satellite
notes: Taiwan-developed Earth observation satellite; 2m resolution; indigenous space capability milestone
